author: anon-581fd578
content:
Plan: Implement Phase 7 (hot reload + CLI) per design.md. 

Modules:
1. protocol.rs — ServerMessage/ClientMessage enums with serde, FileChange, ChangeKind, FileEvent types
2. server.rs — HotReloadServer with notify file watcher, tokio-tungstenite WebSocket broadcast, change classification, auto-build triggering, debounce
3. client.rs — HotReloadClient that connects via background thread, exposes std::sync::mpsc::Receiver for non-blocking polling from UI thread
4. lib.rs — re-exports
5. vitreous-cli main.rs — clap CLI with 'new' (scaffold), 'dev' (hot reload server), 'build' (cargo build --release)

Dependencies to add: serde_json, tokio (rt-multi-thread, net, sync, macros, process), futures-util (sink)

Existing deps: serde 1 (derive), notify 8.2.0, tokio-tungstenite 0.29 (tungstenite 0.29)
